data.title: Trump's push for Lebanon-Israel engagement stalled; Lebanese president refuses further contact.
data.description: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun declined to speak with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. This followed comments from US President Donald Trump that the two leaders would hold a historic meeting. A Lebanese official stated, "We told the US that we are not ready to take that step." Lebanese officials have informed Israel and the US that they will not seek further negotiations until a ceasefire is reached between Israel and Hezbollah. Israel's security cabinet met on Wednesday to discuss a possible ceasefire agreement. Earlier on Thursday, Israeli officials indicated that Netanyahu and Aoun were scheduled to speak—following Israel and Lebanon's first direct dialogue in over four decades this week in Washington, D.C. Trump also posted on social media that the Israeli and Lebanese leaders would speak, but did not disclose any details such as the location or method of the call. Israel has stated that it is not currently seeking to end the war with Hezbollah. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sources: US and Iran lower their ambitions for a comprehensive peace agreement and instead seek a temporary agreement.
data.description: Two Iranian sources said that US and Iranian negotiators have lowered their ambitions for a comprehensive peace agreement, instead seeking a temporary memorandum to avoid a renewed conflict. Following the failure of talks in Islamabad last weekend, deep differences between the two sides over their nuclear programs (such as the fate of their enriched uranium stockpile and the deadline for halting nuclear activities) continue to hinder progress. A senior Iranian official said the two sides have narrowed their differences on issues such as the management of the Strait of Hormuz. Iran hopes the memorandum will include the unfreezing of some US funds in exchange for allowing more ships to pass through the strait. A source briefed in Tehran said that under Iran's proposal, if a lasting agreement is reached, ships would be able to pass freely through the Omani side of the strait without being attacked. However, deeper differences remain, including the fate of their highly enriched uranium stockpile and the deadline for halting nuclear activities. Iranian sources said that if a memorandum on halting the conflict is reached, the two sides are expected to have 60 days to negotiate a final agreement, which will require the involvement of experts and the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA). (Reuters)

data.title: IP Strategy Appoints Brian C. Jun to Board, Enhancing Expertise in Cryptocurrency and AI
data.description: IP Strategy (NASDAQ: IPST) has appointed Brian C. Jun as a member of its board of directors to bolster its expertise in cryptocurrency, taxation, and artificial intelligence. According to Foresight News, Jun currently serves as the Chief Financial Officer at Gurufin Inc., an institutional-grade stablecoin platform focused on cross-border payments and foreign exchange. In his role, he leads Gurufin's financing efforts and establishes its foundational financial and funding operations. Jun brings over 15 years of experience in digital assets, blockchain taxation, and international tax structures, having provided consultancy services to numerous enterprises, financial institutions, and Web3 organizations.

data.title: BitFuFu to Sponsor Bitcoin 2026 Conference in Las Vegas
data.description:
BitFuFu, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, has announced its sponsorship of the Bitcoin 2026 conference. According to Odaily, the event is scheduled to take place from April 27 to 29 in Las Vegas. Alongside this announcement, BitFuFu has introduced a hosting service for Antminer S21 XP mining machines, offering competitive pricing at $9.5 per TH and hosting electricity costs as low as $0.068 per kWh.

BitFuFu will also have a booth at the conference, numbered 863, where attendees can place on-site orders for the mining machines. Charley Brady, the company's Vice President of Investor Relations, is set to participate in a roundtable discussion. The discussion will focus on the role of hosted mining amidst fluctuating computing power and will be held on April 27, 2026, from 11:00 to 11:30 Pacific Time on the Energy Stage.

data.title: U.S. March Industrial Production Falls by 0.5%
data.description: The industrial production in the United States decreased by 0.5% in March, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the expected 0.1% increase. The previous month's data was revised from an initial 0.20% to 0.7%.

data.title: U.S. March Capacity Utilization Falls Short of Expectations
data.description: The capacity utilization rate in the United States for March was recorded at 75.7%, according to Jin10. This figure fell short of the anticipated 76.3%. The previous value was revised from 76.30% to 76.1%.

data.title: Drift Protocol Secures Financial Support for User Recovery Post-Attack
data.description:
Drift Protocol has announced securing financial backing from Tether and other partners to aid in user recovery following an attack on April 1. According to BlockBeats, Tether plans to contribute $127.5 million, while other partners will provide $20 million. This support includes a $100 million revenue-linked credit line, ecosystem grants, and loans to market makers. Drift aims to establish a dedicated user recovery pool to address the $295 million in outstanding user losses as trading revenue grows.

Additionally, Drift will issue independent recovery tokens to affected users, representing claims on the recovery pool and allowing for transferability. The protocol is currently undergoing a restart, with audits conducted by Ottersec and Asymmetric, and is transitioning its settlement layer from USDC to USDT. The attack resulted in the theft of assets valued at approximately $295 million, although insurance fund assets remained unaffected.

data.title: AI-Driven Trading Strategy Yields Significant Returns for Trader Lana
data.description:
Trader Lana has successfully utilized AI to implement her trading strategy, achieving substantial growth in her account. According to Odaily, Lana's approach involves using AI models to automatically select trending cryptocurrencies and execute trades, including setting stop-loss orders. Starting with an initial investment of $100, her account grew to approximately $200,000 within a week.

Current data shows that Lana holds long positions in ORDI, 1000SATS, and 1000RATS contracts. The ORDIUSDT contract employs 25x leverage, with an opening price of $3.25, resulting in a floating profit of $22,000 and a return rate of 1299.69%. The 1000SATSUSDT contract also uses 25x leverage, yielding a floating profit of $5611.01 and a return rate of 935.05%. Meanwhile, the 1000RATSUSDT contract uses 20x leverage, with a floating profit of $2926.91 and a return rate of 473.48%.

Lana emphasizes that her strategy is primarily executed by AI, which selects assets based on their popularity and simultaneously generates trading content.

data.title: Meta Platforms Increases Quest VR Headset Prices Due to Rising Memory Costs
data.description: Meta Platforms has announced an increase in the prices of its Quest VR headsets. According to Jin10, the decision comes as a result of escalating memory costs. The company aims to address the financial pressures caused by these rising expenses. This move reflects broader industry trends where tech companies are adjusting prices in response to supply chain challenges and increased production costs.

data.title: AllUnity Expands Euro-Pegged Stablecoin to Uniswap and Raydium
data.description: AllUnity is set to expand its euro-pegged stablecoin, EURAU, to liquidity pools on Uniswap and Raydium. According to NS3.AI, the MiCA-compliant issuer aims to establish trading pairs with major U.S. dollar stablecoins. This move is intended to enhance euro liquidity and accessibility for institutional investors.

data.title: ByteDance Denies Rumors of High-Paid Recruitment of Former DeepSeek Researcher
data.description: ByteDance has addressed rumors regarding the recruitment of former DeepSeek researcher Guo Daya, allegedly for nearly 100 million yuan. According to Odaily, Douyin Vice President Li Liang clarified that all Seed team technical staff at ByteDance are compensated under the same salary structure, which includes cash, ByteDance options, and Doubao options. These options are fully vested over four years without any conditions for full acquisition. Li also stated that no employee has been hired recently with an annual salary nearing 100 million yuan. The future income of Seed employees from ByteDance and Doubao options may fluctuate based on option prices, and if the business performs well, some Seed technical staff could potentially earn several hundred million yuan after four years.

data.title: Germany Secures €3.8 Billion Power-Cost Support for Industries
data.description: Germany has received approval for a €3.8 billion aid package aimed at reducing power costs for its industries. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this initiative is part of Germany's broader strategy to support its industrial sector amid rising energy prices. The financial assistance is expected to alleviate the burden on companies, ensuring competitiveness and stability in the market. This move comes as Germany continues to navigate the challenges posed by fluctuating energy costs and seeks to maintain its economic resilience.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Investment Demand Surges in 2025, Banks Report Significant Growth
data.description: Gold investment demand among residents has significantly increased in 2025, driven by the continuous rise in international gold prices. According to Jin10, this surge has led to a rapid expansion in banks' precious metals-related businesses. Financial reports from listed banks reveal that among 13 banks that disclosed relevant data, the total scale of precious metal assets has surpassed one trillion yuan, with six banks doubling their precious metal assets. Several institutions have reported substantial growth in physical gold and gold accumulation businesses. Industry analysts believe that the ongoing release of resident gold purchasing demand is a core supporting factor for the growth of banks' precious metals businesses. Looking ahead, gold prices may fluctuate between rapid increases and temporary corrections under different scenarios, with market volatility remaining high.

data.title: Drift: Receives support from Tether and others, plans to establish a $147.5 million recovery pool for user compensation.
data.description: Drift announced on its official website that the Drift Protocol has received support from Tether and other partners, with Tether contributing $127.5 million and other partners contributing $20 million, to support user recovery efforts following the April 1st attack. This support package includes a $100 million revenue-linked credit line, ecosystem grants, and loans to market makers. Drift will establish a dedicated user recovery pool to gradually address the $295 million in outstanding user losses as trading revenue grows. Furthermore, Drift will issue independent recovery tokens to affected users, representing a claim to the recovery pool and are transferable. Drift is currently undergoing a protocol reboot, having engaged Ottersec and Asymmetric for audits and migrating its settlement layer from USDC to USDT. The attack resulted in the theft of approximately $295 million in assets; insurance fund assets were unaffected.

data.title: ORDI broke through $7, with a 24-hour increase of 158.71%.
data.description: OKX market data shows that ORDI has continued its upward trend, breaking through $7 and currently trading at $7.083, with a 24-hour increase of 158.71%. Its 24-hour trading volume reached $2.482 billion, a 24-hour increase of 3053.72%. Currently, ORDI's open interest is valued at $173 million, with a 24-hour increase of 477.61%.

data.title: ByteDance responds to rumors of spending nearly 100 million yuan to poach core employees from DeepSeek: No employees with annual salaries approaching 100 million yuan have been recruited recently.
data.description: Regarding rumors that ByteDance spent nearly 100 million yuan to poach former DeepSeek researcher Guo Daya, Douyin Vice President Li Liang responded that all Seed team technical personnel recruited by ByteDance have the same salary system, including cash, ByteDance stock options, and Doubao stock options. The options vest fully over four years, and there is no situation where "certain conditions must be met to receive the full amount." Furthermore, ByteDance has not recently recruited any employees with annual salaries approaching 100 million yuan. The future income of Seed employees' ByteDance and Doubao stock options will fluctuate based on the option prices. If the business develops well, it is possible that some Seed technical personnel will earn hundreds of millions of yuan after four years. (Yicai)

data.title: The US launched Operation Economic Fury against Iran.
data.description: On April 16 local time, U.S. Defense Secretary Hergsays said at a press conference that the U.S. Treasury Department was launching an operation codenamed "Economic Fury" to "exert maximum economic pressure on Iran." (CCTV)

data.title: Fed's Williams Projects Inflation to Return to 2% Target by 2027
data.description: Federal Reserve official John Williams has projected that inflation will return to the central bank's 2% target by 2027. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the importance of maintaining a steady approach to monetary policy to achieve this goal. He noted that while current inflation rates remain above the desired level, ongoing efforts to stabilize the economy are expected to gradually bring inflation down. Williams also highlighted the need for vigilance in monitoring economic indicators to ensure that the inflation trajectory aligns with the Fed's objectives.

data.title: Fed's Williams Expects Unemployment Rate to Stay Between 4.25%-4.5%
data.description: Federal Reserve official John Williams has projected that the unemployment rate will remain between 4.25% and 4.5%. According to Jin10, Williams emphasized the importance of maintaining this range to support economic stability. He noted that the current labor market conditions are conducive to achieving the Fed's broader economic goals. Williams' comments reflect ongoing assessments of employment trends and their implications for monetary policy.

data.title: Strategy Introduces Bitcoin-Per-Share Metric Reflecting Holdings
data.description: Strategy has introduced a new Bitcoin-per-share metric on its website, indicating 0.00205812 BTC for each MSTR share. According to NS3.AI, this figure is designed to illustrate the company's Bitcoin holdings in relation to its stock. Strategy currently holds a total of 780,897 BTC, as stated by Michael Saylor.
